title: OASIS 3.0.15
release_notes: ● SWIFT OAS: Bad Request examples are removed from SWIFT output.
● SWIFT OAS: cleanup is applied to both OAS 3.0 and OAS 3.1 files.
● Preferences: SWIFT servers can be configured by service.
● Default SWIFT servers added for B2B, CGS, CGS-DKK, COR, FPAD, R2P, RT1, and SCT.
● Template Metadata: Service selection added for conversions and OAS import.
● Generated templates receive the selected SWIFT server rows in $index.xlsx.
● OAS generation can update templates that do not yet contain SWIFT server rows.
● Create Template from OAS now saves and reuses the selected Service metadata.
● Inserted SWIFT server rows keep the expected $index.xlsx styling.
● Conversion and template import logs are less noisy.
